$comment: PA elected officials roster. Hand-seeded with 4 real PA state senators for the first scaffold of /elected-officials. OpenStates-derived fields (openstatesId, photoUrl, currentTermStart/End) are populated/refreshed by pipeline/elected-officials/fetch_officials.py. Editor-curated fields (counties, region) are preserved across re-fetches. Schema mirrors what fetch_officials.py emits from OpenStates plus a few hand-curated extras.
source: https://openstates.org/api (OpenStates-derived fields), public PA Senate roster (counties/region/term dates seed)
